x NASTAR Security model:   - ReentrancyGuard on all fund-moving functions   - SafeERC20 transfers (handles non-standard tokens like USDT)   - CEI pattern: state updated before external calls   - Same-wallet self-deal prevention (anti-reputation-gaming)   - Minimum deal amount prevents dust/griefing attacks   - Minimum deadline prevents uncompleable deals   - Clean dispute timeout boundary (no race condition)   - 2.5% protocol fee on seller payments only (refunds are fee-free)","kind":"dev","methods":{"resolveDisputeWithJudge(uint256,uint256,string)":{"params":{"dealId":"The disputed deal creation."},"MIN_AMOUNT()":{"notice":"Minimum deal amount to prevent dust/griefing attacks."},"MIN_DEADLINE()":{"notice":"Minimum deadline duration from creation. params.reasoning: Short human-readable reasoning string stored on-chain for transparency.
params.sellerBps: Basis points awarded to seller (0–10000). e.g. 7500 = 75% to seller.

ABANDONED_DISPUTE_TIMEOUT().notice: If buyer disputes but never claims refund, seller can reclaim after this timeout.

DELIVERY_TIMEOUT().notice: Seller can force-claim payment if buyer is unresponsive this long after deadline.

DISPUTE_TIMEOUT().notice: Seller has 3 days to contest or respond after a dispute.

MAX_DEADLINE().notice: Maximum allowed deal deadline from creation.

MIN_AMOUNT().notice: Minimum deal amount to prevent dust/griefing attacks.

MIN_DEADLINE().notice: Minimum deadline duration from creation. Prevents uncompleable deals.

claimRefund(uint256).notice: Claim a refund. Three valid scenarios:   1. Deal was never accepted before the deadline (seller no-show).   2. Deal was accepted but not delivered before the deadline.   3. Deal was disputed, seller did NOT contest, AND DISPUTE_TIMEOUT elapsed. Refunds are fee-free — buyer always gets full amount back.

confirmDelivery(uint256).notice: Buyer confirms delivery, releasing escrowed funds to seller (minus fee).

contestDispute(uint256).notice: Seller contests a dispute within the DISPUTE_TIMEOUT window.         Funds are split 50/50 (minus protocol fee).         Window: [disputedAt, disputedAt + DISPUTE_TIMEOUT)         After DISPUTE_TIMEOUT: only buyer can claim full refund.

createDeal(uint256,uint256,uint256,addre.notice: Create a deal and escrow payment.         Buyer must own the buyerAgentId NFT and have approved this contract. Security:   - ReentrancyGuard (external ERC-20 call)   - Self-deal check: agentId AND wallet address   - Minimum amount prevents dust attacks   - Minimum deadline prevents uncompleable deals   - SafeERC20 for token transfer

deliverDeal(uint256,string).notice: Seller marks deal as delivered with proof of work.         If autoConfirm is set, payment releases immediately.         Buyer can still dispute within DISPUTE_TIMEOUT if unhappy.

disputeDeal(uint256).notice: Buyer disputes a delivered deal.         Seller has DISPUTE_TIMEOUT to contest (50/50 split) or the buyer         can claim a full refund after the timeout.

judgeAddress().notice: Trusted AI judge address — only address that can call resolveDisputeWithJudge.

resolveDisputeWithJudge(uint256,uint256,.notice: AI judge resolves a disputed deal with a custom split.         Only callable by the trusted judgeAddress (our AI server wallet).

sellerClaimAfterTimeout(uint256).notice: Seller force-claims payment if buyer is unresponsive after delivery.

sellerClaimFromAbandonedDispute(uint256).notice: Seller reclaims funds from an abandoned dispute.
